docket_entries.description: ORDER CASE CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE. (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.)

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-20-2023 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO FEB-24-2023 AT 8:30 AM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF ABRAHAM PANOSSIAN IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT SAE DVORAK IS NOT PRESENT. NO PROOF OF SERVICE. PLAINTIFF PRESENTS IN COURT PROOF OF SERVICE BY MAIL WHICH IS IMPROPER. CONTINUED DATE FEB-24-2023 REQUESTED BY PLAINTIFF. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGEPROTEM: WILLIAM LYNN; CLERK: D. AU. NOT REPORTED. (D506)
ORDER CASE DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.)
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $9,022.52 FILED BY PANOSSIAN, ABRAHAM AS TO DEFENDANT DVORAK, SAE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-20-2023 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. NO APPEARANCES BY PLAINTIFF. NO APPEARANCES BY DEFENDANT. JUDGE PRO TEM: WILLIAM LYNN; CLERK: D. AU. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
